PostToolUse.command: bash -c 'TOOL=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_name // empty"); case "$TOOL" in edit/editFiles|edit/createFile|editFiles|createFile) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; COUNT=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | wc -l); UNTRACKED=$(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null | wc -l); STAGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | wc -l); TOTAL=$((COUNT + UNTRACKED + STAGED)); if [ "$TOTAL" -ge 5 ]; then echo "" >&2; echo "⚠️  COMMIT REMINDER: $TOTAL uncommitted file changes detected." >&2; echo "   Consider committing incrementally to keep changes reviewable." >&2; echo "   Run: /commit or gk ai commit -d" >&2; echo "" >&2; fi; exit 0'
PostToolUse.windows: bash -c 'TOOL=$(cat | jq -r ".tool_name // empty"); case "$TOOL" in edit/editFiles|edit/createFile|editFiles|createFile) ;; *) exit 0;; esac; COUNT=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | wc -l); UNTRACKED=$(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>/dev/null | wc -l); STAGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null | wc -l); TOTAL=$((COUNT + UNTRACKED + STAGED)); if [ "$TOTAL" -ge 5 ]; then echo "" >&2; echo "⚠️  COMMIT REMINDER: $TOTAL uncommitted file changes detected." >&2; echo "   Consider committing incrementally to keep changes reviewable." >&2; echo "   Run: /commit or gk ai commit -d" >&2; echo "" >&2; fi; exit 0'
